pi_items.source: export_result.sh checks for 'Exoplanet Explorer'; verifier.py verifies expected_title
verifier.py checks for '$:/state/ExoplanetFilter' string and transclusion syntax
setup_task.sh injects these fields into 10 tiddlers; verifier.py checks for these field names
setup_task.sh generates tiddlers containing these 3 exact values for discovery-method
setup_task.sh generates tiddlers containing these 3 exact values for planet-type

privileged_info_summary: The target dashboard tiddler is named 'Exoplanet Explorer' and it uses a state tiddler named '$:/state/ExoplanetFilter' for tracking filter state. The underlying data consists of 10 synthetically generated tiddlers in setup_task.sh, containing fields 'discovery-method' (options: Transit, Radial Velocity, Imaging) and 'planet-type' (options: Gas Giant, Super Earth, Terrestrial).
